mandatory_documents: Proof of attempt to resolve with merchant
Proof services/goods not used after cancellation
Proof of attempt to resolve with merchant

optional_documents: Transaction proof (bank statement showing disputed recurring charge)
mandatory_documents: Evidence of attempt to resolve with merchant
Merchant advertisements/product descriptions/terms showing what was promised
Proof of attempt to resolve with merchant

optional_documents: Bank statement showing original debit (and no refund credit)
mandatory_documents: Terms & conditions/cancellation policy showing refund eligibility
Proof of attempt to resolve with merchant

optional_documents: Dispute form (bank format) - Required only if more than 2 disputed transactions
Customer complaint (written/oral) stating: Date, time, and ATM location, Amount attempted to withdraw, Amount actually received (if any), Confirmation that cash not/partially dispensed
Customer complaint (written/oral) stating: Date and amount of disputed transactions, Merchant details, Confirmation of same transaction debited multiple times
Customer written complaint stating: Transaction date and amount, Merchant details, Confirmation payment made by another method but card also charged
mandatory_documents: Proof of alternative payment such as Cash receipt signed by merchant / Cheque copy + bank clearing proof / Online banking/UPI/NEFT confirmation/ Wallet transaction confirmation
Communication with merchant about duplicate/extra charge
Itemized invoices detailing goods/services and total cost
Proof of correct account number and transaction amount matching order receipt
Sales documentation showing no addition errors
Proof of attempt to resolve dispute with merchant
